title: elaphoglossum capuronii
intro: Elaphoglossum capuronii is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum capuronii include its potential to reduce oxidative stress and inflammation, as well as its possible role in treating various health conditions such as fever and respiratory issues. Elaphoglossum capuronii can be prepared as an herbal infusion or decoction, and it is also used in traditional medicine to make tea.
